description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with a strong emphasis on geometric lines and flat surfaces. The structure is primarily composed of rectangular volumes, with a large flat roof and expansive paved areas surrounding the main living quarters. The exterior is finished in a combination of dark and light materials, likely concrete or stucco, with some sections possibly featuring glass or metal accents. The layout includes a prominent entryway accessed by a set of steps, and the house appears to have a single story with a spacious open-plan arrangement. There are large, open outdoor spaces, including what may be a patio or terrace, and a long, rectangular section that could serve as a garage or covered walkway. The windows are arranged in a modern, asymmetrical pattern, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story house with flat roofs, geometric lines, and a mix of dark and light exterior materials. Features include a prominent entryway, large paved areas, and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, steps, and a large paved area leading to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, rectangular section, possibly a garage or covered walkway, and the flat roof design.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizing the extended paved area and the linear arrangement of the house's volumes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back of the house, additional paved space, and the overall flat, modern profile.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, minimal overhang, and a clean, geometric design
